controls.access: Development scoring must reject any bar file containing a session on or after the holdout start.
controls.release: A separately committed release artifact is required before the only terminal holdout evaluation.

exclusions.interim_targets: No holdout outcomes, scores, residuals, or directional summaries may be inspected before release.

hypothesis.statement: This supplement governs access only and adds no alpha hypothesis.

pass_fail.release_gate: Both the minimum session count and earliest evaluation date must be satisfied; only one terminal look is permitted.

placebos.none: Placebos are defined by the parent experiment and run on development data.

question: When may the prospective EXP-2026-001 holdout be opened?

signal.construction: No holdout signal panel may be joined to outcomes before release.

target.construction: Not constructed for holdout sessions before release.
